name: Crypto-Knowledge
description: The on-chain brain for AI agents: action 'ask' returns correct, live-verified Web3 knowledge in ONE call instead of burning search/reasoning credits. 77+ runbooks across Bitcoin, Ethereum & Solana — coding (wallets, deploys, signing, tx debugging, x402, gas), DeFi (lending, vaults, stableswap, yield) and trading strategies (arbitrage, MEV, bots, liquidations, perps, prediction markets) — plus a directory of keyless free APIs, canonical addresses and an error playbook.

inputs.description: POST this JSON body to the endpoint.

action.description: ask (RECOMMENDED) — send a natural-language question, get the best guides AND matching endpoints/addresses in ONE call; list_topics (free) lists all guides + reference tables; get_guide returns one runbook by id; search does deep full-text over guide bodies; reference returns a curated table.

topic.description: Guide id for get_guide, e.g. create_wallet, debug_failed_tx, x402_payments, register_onchain_tool.

data.description: guide (title, steps with real commands, warnings, references) or reference table entries

requirements.label: Hold >=1 Normies NFT (ERC-721, Ethereum) for free access; otherwise pay $0.10 USDC per request via x402 on Base. Enforced on-chain by the canonical ERC721OwnerPredicate.

io.opensea.access.description: Holding a Normies NFT grants free access. Non-holders pay $0.10 USDC per request via x402 on Base. Listing topics is free.

io.opensea.display.title: Crypto-Knowledge
io.opensea.display.subtitle: The on-chain brain for AI agents — runbooks, addresses, endpoints, error playbooks

pricing.description: Per-request fee for non-Normies-holders: $0.10 USDC on Base via x402. Normies NFT holders are free; listing topics is free for everyone.
